text.description: The text to convert to speech. Maximum length varies by model.

model_id.description: The identifier of the model to use. Use GET /v1/models to list available models. The model must support text to speech.

pronunciation_dictionary_locators.description: A list of pronunciation dictionary locators to apply to the text. Applied in order, with a maximum of 3 locators per request.

seed.description: A seed value for deterministic generation. Using the same seed with the same parameters produces the same audio output.

previous_text.description: Text that came before the current text for context continuity.

next_text.description: Text that comes after the current text for context continuity.

language_code.description: Language code for the text, in ISO 639-1 format. Helps the model produce more accurate pronunciation for the specified language.
